interfaces.name: RiskInputs
interfaces.signature: struct RiskInputs: Codable, Sendable, Equatable { var ageYears: Int; var sex: BiologicalSex; var heightCm: Double; var weightKg: Double; var smokingStatus: SmokingStatus; var familyHistoryOfCVD: Bool; var ethnicity: Ethnicity?; var systolicBP: Double?; var systolicBPStandardDeviation: Double?; var treatedHypertension: Bool?; var totalCholesterolMmolPerL: Double?; var hdlCholesterolMmolPerL: Double?; var diabetesStatus: DiabetesStatus?; var comorbidities: Set<Comorbidity> }
interfaces.notes: Canonical storage is always SI-ish units (cm, kg, mmol/L, mmHg); UnitConversion handles display. Optional fields are nil until the clinical-precision step is completed; RiskOutput.isEstimate reflects that.

interfaces.name: BiologicalSex
interfaces.signature: enum BiologicalSex: String, Codable, Sendable { case male, female }
interfaces.notes: QRISK3 input, not a general identity field.

interfaces.name: SmokingStatus
interfaces.signature: enum SmokingStatus: String, Codable, Sendable, CaseIterable { case nonSmoker, exSmoker, lightSmoker, moderateSmoker, heavySmoker }
interfaces.notes: Quick-estimate field.

interfaces.name: Ethnicity
interfaces.signature: enum Ethnicity: String, Codable, Sendable, CaseIterable { case notStated, white, southAsian, black, chinese, other }
interfaces.notes: Optional; affects QRISK3 coefficients but must be skippable without blocking the quick estimate.

interfaces.name: DiabetesStatus
interfaces.signature: enum DiabetesStatus: String, Codable, Sendable { case none, type1, type2 }
interfaces.notes: Clinical-precision field.

interfaces.name: Comorbidity
interfaces.signature: enum Comorbidity: String, Codable, Sendable, CaseIterable, Hashable { case rheumatoidArthritis, chronicKidneyDisease, atrialFibrillation, migraines, sle, severeMentalIllness, atypicalAntipsychoticUse, corticosteroidUse, erectileDysfunction }
interfaces.notes: Clinical-precision multi-select.

interfaces.name: RiskBand
interfaces.signature: enum RiskBand: String, Codable, Sendable { case low, moderate, high }
interfaces.notes: Never rendered color-only; always paired with RiskBandBadge icon+text.

interfaces.name: FormulaVersion
interfaces.signature: enum FormulaVersion: String, Codable, Sendable { case qrisk3_2017 }
interfaces.notes: Stored per-assessment; new cases added on recalibration, never mutate old assessments' computedOutput.

interfaces.name: RiskOutput
interfaces.signature: struct RiskOutput: Codable, Sendable, Equatable { var scorePercent: Double; var band: RiskBand; var isEstimate: Bool }
interfaces.notes: isEstimate true until clinical-precision step completed.

interfaces.name: RiskAssessment
interfaces.signature: struct RiskAssessment: Codable, Sendable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: UUID; let date: Date; let formulaVersion: FormulaVersion; let rawInputs: RiskInputs; let computedOutput: RiskOutput }
interfaces.notes: The three fields (rawInputs/formulaVersion/computedOutput) must stay separate and never be collapsed into just the score.

interfaces.name: InputDelta
interfaces.signature: struct InputDelta: Sendable, Identifiable { let id: String; let fieldLabel: String; let previousValue: String; let newValue: String; let changed: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Produced by RiskProfileStore.diff for the Trends tap-to-compare interaction; rendered by AssessmentDiffView.

interfaces.name: RiskCalculationEngine
interfaces.signature: enum RiskCalculationEngine { static func calculate(inputs: RiskInputs, formulaVersion: FormulaVersion) throws -> RiskOutput }
interfaces.notes: Namespace enum (no cases), static func only. Pure, nonisolated, Sendable, no SwiftUI/store dependency. Throws RiskCalculationError.missingRequiredQuickField if age/sex/smoking/height/weight absent.

interfaces.name: RiskCalculationError
interfaces.signature: enum RiskCalculationError: Error, Sendable { case missingRequiredQuickField(String) }
interfaces.notes: Surfaced by the wizard as inline validation, never a crash.

interfaces.name: UnitConversion
interfaces.signature: enum UnitConversion { static func mmolPerLToMgPerDL(_ v: Double) -> Double; static func mgPerDLToMmolPerL(_ v: Double) -> Double; static func cmToInches(_ v: Double) -> Double; static func inchesToCm(_ v: Double) -> Double; static func kgToPounds(_ v: Double) -> Double; static func poundsToKg(_ v: Double) -> Double }
interfaces.notes: Namespace enum, static func only. Round-trip tested; every downstream score depends on these being exact.

interfaces.name: GPQuestionGenerator
interfaces.signature: enum GPQuestionGenerator { static func generateQuestions(for output: RiskOutput, inputs: RiskInputs) -> [String] }
interfaces.notes: Namespace enum, static func only. Deterministic rule-based list feeding the Prep Sheet's 'questions to ask your GP' block.

interfaces.name: RiskProfileStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class RiskProfileStore { private(set) var assessments: [RiskAssessment]; var latestAssessment: RiskAssessment? { get }; func load() async; func addAssessment(inputs: RiskInputs) async throws -> RiskAssessment; func diff(_ a: RiskAssessment, _ b: RiskAssessment) -> [InputDelta] }
interfaces.notes: Declared as a Swift class (reference type) so @Observable works; single source of truth for committed data, injected via environment at RootTabView, not threaded through initializers.

interfaces.name: SnapshotFileStore
interfaces.signature: actor SnapshotFileStore { func load() async throws -> [RiskAssessment]; func save(_ assessments: [RiskAssessment]) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Declared as Swift `actor`, not a protocol. File in Application Support, .completeUntilFirstUserAuthentication protection, included in iCloud device backup. Read failure surfaces as empty array, not a thrown crash, so RiskProfileStore.load falls back to empty state.

interfaces.name: PersistenceError
interfaces.signature: enum PersistenceError: Error, Sendable { case readFailed, decodingFailed, writeFailed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: readFailed/decodingFailed are caught by RiskProfileStore.load and treated as empty-state, never propagated to UI as an error screen.

interfaces.name: WizardDraftStore
interfaces.signature: actor WizardDraftStore { func saveDraft(_ draft: WizardDraft) async; func loadDraft() async -> WizardDraft?; func clearDraft() async }
interfaces.notes: Declared as Swift `actor`, not a protocol. Separate file from committed assessments. Autosaved on scenePhase .background transitions (observed once, at RootTabView) during the wizard; cleared on confirm/cancel. Prevents silent loss of a half-completed clinical-precision entry.

interfaces.name: WizardDraft
interfaces.signature: struct WizardDraft: Codable, Sendable { var quickEstimateAnswers: RiskInputs; var clinicalAnswers: RiskInputs; var currentStep: Int }
interfaces.notes: Partial/optional-heavy variant of RiskInputs; not a full RiskAssessment since it's never computed until confirm.

interfaces.name: RiskGaugeView
interfaces.signature: struct RiskGaugeView: View { init(output: RiskOutput?, isLoading: Bool) }
interfaces.notes: nil output + isLoading false renders the empty-state prompt; isLoading true renders skeleton; animates arc fill 0.6s spring on load, snaps under Reduce Motion.

interfaces.name: RiskBandBadge
interfaces.signature: struct RiskBandBadge: View { init(band: RiskBand) }
interfaces.notes: The only place a band is ever rendered; reused on Home, AssessmentDiffView, and Prep Sheet so color-independence can't drift.

interfaces.name: TrendLineChart
interfaces.signature: struct TrendLineChart: View { init(assessments: [RiskAssessment], onSelectMarker: @escaping (RiskAssessment) -> Void) }
interfaces.notes: Built on Swift Charts; owns an internal hasAnimated flag so line draw-in fires once per session, not on every tab reselect.

interfaces.name: AssessmentMarker
interfaces.signature: struct AssessmentMarker: Identifiable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let date: Date; let scorePercent: Double }
interfaces.notes: Presentational projection of RiskAssessment for Charts marks; carries id back for the diff-on-tap flow.

interfaces.name: PrepSheetDocument
interfaces.signature: struct PrepSheetDocument: View { init(assessment: RiskAssessment, trend: [RiskAssessment], forcedLightAppearance: Bool = false) }
interfaces.notes: Single layout source backing both the on-screen Prep Sheet and the PDF export; forcedLightAppearance=true is required for export regardless of live Dark Mode/Dynamic Type.

interfaces.name: WizardStepContainer
interfaces.signature: struct WizardStepContainer<Content: View>: View { init(stepIndex: Int, totalSteps: Int, isEstimate: Bool, onBack: (() -> Void)?, onNext: @escaping () -> Void, @ViewBuilder content: () -> Content) }
interfaces.notes: Shared chrome; back navigation must preserve already-entered answers, never reset the other step's draft.

interfaces.name: QuickEstimateForm
interfaces.signature: struct QuickEstimateForm: View { init(draft: Binding<RiskInputs>, onNext: @escaping () -> Void) }
interfaces.notes: Local-state form; commits nothing to RiskProfileStore directly.

interfaces.name: ClinicalPrecisionForm
interfaces.signature: struct ClinicalPrecisionForm: View { init(draft: Binding<RiskInputs>, onComplete: @escaping (RiskInputs) -> Void) }
interfaces.notes: onComplete produces the merged RiskInputs that RiskProfileStore.addAssessment consumes on confirm.

interfaces.name: UnitToggle
interfaces.signature: struct UnitToggle<Unit: CaseIterable & Hashable & RawRepresentable>: View where Unit.RawValue == String { init(selection: Binding<Unit>) }
interfaces.notes: Flagged for explicit Dynamic Type XXL stress testing; most likely control to clip next to a numeric field. Used both in the wizard (session-local override) and SettingsView (persisted default).

interfaces.name: PDFExportService
interfaces.signature: enum PDFExportService { static func renderPDF(from document: PrepSheetDocument) async -> Data }
interfaces.notes: Namespace enum, static func only. Wraps ImageRenderer with a forced light-mode, standard-Dynamic-Type environment; caller passes forcedLightAppearance: true into PrepSheetDocument.

interfaces.name: SubscriptionManager
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class SubscriptionManager { private(set) var entitlementState: EntitlementState; func start() async; func purchase(_ product: SubscriptionProduct) async throws; func restorePurchases() async throws }
interfaces.notes: Declared as a Swift class. start() begins the Transaction listener at launch; entitlementState is cached and trusted until a fresh check succeeds, never gates Prep Sheet export behind a live network call.

interfaces.name: EntitlementState
interfaces.signature: enum EntitlementState: Sendable, Equatable { case unknown, free, subscribed(expiresAt: Date?), expired }
interfaces.notes: unknown is the pre-first-check state, treated as free-tier-visible, never as a hard lock.

interfaces.name: SubscriptionProduct
interfaces.signature: enum SubscriptionProduct: String, CaseIterable, Sendable { case monthly, annual }
interfaces.notes: Maps to StoreKit product identifiers; backed by a local .storekit config for testing.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler
interfaces.signature: enum NotificationScheduler { static func scheduleUpdateReminder(after interval: TimeInterval) async }
interfaces.notes: Namespace enum, static func only. Requested contextually after first assessment completes, never on cold launch; local UNUserNotificationCenter only.

interfaces.name: AppLockController
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class AppLockController { private(set) var isLocked: Bool; func authenticate() async -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Declared as a Swift class. Optional Face ID/Touch ID gate via LocalAuthentication; off by default, opt-in given BP/cholesterol sensitivity, toggled from SettingsView.

interfaces.name: EmptyStateView
interfaces.signature: struct EmptyStateView: View { init(title: String, message: String, systemImage: String, actionTitle: String?, action: (() -> Void)?) }
interfaces.notes: One shared component for Home/Trends/Prep-Sheet empty states so each screen doesn't hand-roll a slightly different one.

interfaces.name: LoadingSkeletonView
interfaces.signature: struct LoadingSkeletonView: View { init(kind: SkeletonKind) }
interfaces.notes: Used for the Home gauge's loading state while RiskProfileStore.load() is in flight.

interfaces.name: SkeletonKind
interfaces.signature: enum SkeletonKind: Sendable { case gauge, chart, list }
interfaces.notes: Discriminates skeleton shape per screen.

interfaces.name: CholesterolUnit
interfaces.signature: enum CholesterolUnit: String, CaseIterable, Codable, Sendable { case mmolPerL, mgPerDL }
interfaces.notes: Display preference only; canonical storage in RiskInputs is always mmol/L.

interfaces.name: WeightUnit
interfaces.signature: enum WeightUnit: String, CaseIterable, Codable, Sendable { case kg, lb }
interfaces.notes: Display preference only; canonical storage in RiskInputs is always kg.

interfaces.name: HeightUnit
interfaces.signature: enum HeightUnit: String, CaseIterable, Codable, Sendable { case cm, inches }
interfaces.notes: Display preference only; canonical storage in RiskInputs is always cm.

interfaces.name: RootTabView
interfaces.signature: struct RootTabView: View { }
interfaces.notes: App entry point; owns TabView selection (Home/Trends/Prep Sheet), injects RiskProfileStore/SubscriptionManager/UnitPreferencesStore into environment once, and is the single place scenePhase is observed to trigger WizardDraftStore autosave when the wizard sheet is presented.

interfaces.name: SettingsView
interfaces.signature: struct SettingsView: View { }
interfaces.notes: Reached via gear icon on Home, not a tab. Hosts UnitToggle-driven default preferences (via UnitPreferencesStore), optional notification reminder toggle, optional AppLockController toggle, and subscription management entry point.

interfaces.name: AssessmentDiffView
interfaces.signature: struct AssessmentDiffView: View { init(earlier: RiskAssessment, later: RiskAssessment, deltas: [InputDelta]) }
interfaces.notes: Sheet presented from TrendLineChart's onSelectMarker after two markers are picked; shows both RiskBandBadges plus the field-by-field delta list.

interfaces.name: UnitPreferencesStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class UnitPreferencesStore { var cholesterolUnit: CholesterolUnit; var weightUnit: WeightUnit; var heightUnit: HeightUnit }
interfaces.notes: Declared as a Swift class, UserDefaults-backed (display preference only, not medical data, so no Application-Support file-protection treatment needed). Single source every screen reads for default display units.
